name: Sindhi Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 3-quart saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Saute cinnamon, cloves, and bay leaf for 1 minute.
3. Add onion and saute until dark brown (about 20 to 25 minutes), stirring frequently to prevent burning.
4. Add garlic and ginger; cook for 2 minutes.
5. Add tomatoes and cook until soft, about 8 minutes. Mash with the back of a spoon.
6. Add cilantro powder, cumin, chilli powder, turmeric, and salt. Cook for 2 to 3 minutes.
7. Stir in yogurt and mix well.
8. Add chicken and cover. Cook on medium heat until chicken is tender.
9. Garnish with fresh cilantro.
